description: Elena encounters Ivanov and the two battle, culminating with Elena tackling Ivanov through a window. After Ivanov is subdued, the mechs he was controlling all deactivate, indicating his central role in controlling them. This moment provides a breather for the team.
location: Hydra facility (abandoned English nuclear silo / Particle Infusion Chamber site)

transcript.line: Oh! Please tell me you still believe time can't be changed.
You want to debate that now? Isn't... Isn't that why we're here?
No, Fitz, just tell me it's against the law of physics. I need that right now.
The perception of time is an illusion.
No, you know, I was wrong. It's not helping.
I heard what happened to you. Now you are also part machine.
I no longer feel pain. Unlike you. I have died dozens of times. But you, no second chances.
Who's superior now? He was controlling them.
